name: Cleanup Previous Container
description: After a deployer reinstall: writes deployer-instance marker to the new container's notes, determines the redirect URL, and schedules async cleanup (stop + destroy) of the previous container.

parameters.name: Previous VM ID
parameters.description: VM ID of the previous deployer container to clean up

parameters.name: New VM ID
parameters.description: VM ID of the newly created container

parameters.name: HTTP Port
parameters.description: HTTP port of the new deployer instance

parameters.name: HTTPS Port
parameters.description: HTTPS port of the new deployer instance
